<b>Hover</b> the icon (or trigger zone): Hover the icon (or trigger zone) to temporarily expand the hidden area.
<b>Left-click</b> the icon to manually t: Left-click the icon to manually toggle the expanded state.
<b>Right-click</b> the icon while expand: Right-click the icon while expanded to PIN (prevent auto-collapse).
Adjust the height (thickness) of the tri: Adjust the height (thickness) of the trigger area perpendicular to the bar.
Allow triggering expansion by hovering o: Allow triggering expansion by hovering over the area where icons are hidden.
Auto hides every eligible widget. Blackl: Auto hides every eligible widget. Blacklist hides all except the widgets you pick. Whitelist hides only the widgets you pick.
Completely hide the trigger icon pill wh: Completely hide the trigger icon pill when the bar is collapsed.
Completely hide the trigger icon pill when the bar is expanded.
Fine-tune the trigger zone width along t: Fine-tune the trigger zone width along the bar axis. Positive values expand it, negative values shrink it.
Found a bug or have a feature request? P: Found a bug or have a feature request? Please report it on the GitHub repository.
How icons are arranged inside the popout: How icons are arranged inside the popout.
How long the slide animation takes.
Limit the number of widgets to hide. Set: Limit the number of widgets to hide. Set to 0 to hide all.
Never hide the system tray widgets.
No manageable widgets detected yet. Add: No manageable widgets detected yet. Add widgets to the bar, then run 'dms restart'.
Please run 'dms restart' after adding wi: Please run 'dms restart' after adding widgets to the status bar for changes to take effect.
Recommendation: Disable 'Auto-collapse': Recommendation: Disable 'Auto-collapse' when using Popout mode as it is currently unstable. Avoid placing widgets with their own popouts (e.g., system tray, network/bluetooth) inside the hidden bar when Popout mode is active.
Shift the trigger zone position along th: Shift the trigger zone position along the bar axis. Positive values shift right/down, negative values shift left/up.
Shift the trigger zone position perpendi: Shift the trigger zone position perpendicular to the bar axis. Positive values shift down/right, negative values shift up/left.
Show hidden plugins in a separate popout: Show hidden plugins in a separate popout menu instead of expanding the status bar.
Slide widgets in and out instead of swit: Slide widgets in and out instead of switching instantly. When off, the space is reclaimed immediately.
Wait time before expanding on hover.
